description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OctoBot-Tentacles-CI that runs on push to master, dev, beta branches and tags, and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: tests, upload_tentacles, and notify. The tests job runs on a matrix of OS (macos-latest, windows-latest, ubuntu-latest), architecture (x64), and Python version (3.10), checks out the code, installs OctoBot, runs tests with pytest, and publishes coverage to Coveralls. The upload_tentacles job runs on a matrix of OS (ubuntu-latest), architecture (x64), and Python version (3.10), produces a tentacles package, and uploads it to S3 and Cloudflare. The notify job sends a notification on failure.
